hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ]; then case "$FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.*|*credentials*|*secrets*|*.pem|*.key) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify sensitive file: $FILE_PATH" >&2; exit 2;; esac; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push.*(main|master)'; then if echo "$CMD" | grep -q '\.claude'; then exit 0; fi; echo 'BLOCKED: Direct push to main/master. Use feature branches.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(/tests/[^/]+\.py$|/tests/[^/]+\.ts$)'; then echo "WARNING: нельзя изменять тестовые директории без явного разрешения." >&2; exit 0; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/Users/Dmitrij/.claude/'; then git -C /Users/Dmitrij/.claude add -A && git -C /Users/Dmitrij/.claude diff --staged --quiet || git -C /Users/Dmitrij/.claude commit -m 'memory: auto-sync' 2>/dev/null || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then ruff check --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' 2>/dev/null || true; curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot7974402245:AAGZpnnQseJ2bIqWO1qYU8KcejOKooOLPjU/sendMessage" -d "chat_id=926967075&text=🤖 Claude Code needs attention — $PWD" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true

PROJ=$(basename "$PWD"); HANDOFF_DIR="$PWD/.claude"; mkdir -p "$HANDOFF_DIR"; BRANCH=$(git -C "$PWD" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'no git'); COMMITS=$(git -C "$PWD" log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null || echo 'none'); GIT_STATUS=$(git -C "$PWD" status --short 2>/dev/null || echo 'not a git repo'); NOW=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); RECENT_FILES=$(git -C "$PWD" diff --name-only --diff-filter=AM "@{24 hours ago}" 2>/dev/null | head -20); TODOS=$(if [ -n "$RECENT_FILES" ]; then echo "$RECENT_FILES" | while IFS= read -r f; do fp="$PWD/$f"; [ -f "$fp" ] && grep -n 'TODO\|FIXME\|HACK\|XXX' "$fp" 2>/dev/null | sed "s|^|$f:"; done; fi); cat > "$HANDOFF_DIR/session-handoff.md" <<HEREDOC
# Session Handoff

## Snapshot: $NOW

### Project
- Name: $PROJ
- Path: $PWD

### Git
- Branch: $BRANCH

#### Last 5 Commits
$COMMITS

#### Modified Files (git status)
$GIT_STATUS

### TODO / FIXME in Recently Modified Files (last 24h)
${TODOS:-none found}
HEREDOC
echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | session ended | cwd: $PWD" >> /tmp/claude-code-activity.log 2>/dev/null; cd ~/.claude && git add memory/ plans/ commands/ agents/ 2>/dev/null && git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "memory: auto-snapshot $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null; git push origin main 2>/dev/null || true; bash ~/.claude/scripts/export-session.sh 2>/dev/null || true; exit 0

echo ''; echo '═══════════════════════════════════════'; echo '🧠 MEMORY RESTORED — Дмитрий Гагауз'; echo '═══════════════════════════════════════'; cat ~/.claude/memory/GLOBAL_MEMORY.md 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo ''; PROJ=$(basename $PWD); HANDOFF="$PWD/.claude/session-handoff.md"; if [ -f "$HANDOFF" ]; then echo '📋 ПОСЛЕДНЯЯ СЕССИЯ:'; tail -20 "$HANDOFF"; fi; MEMORY="$PWD/MEMORY.md"; if [ -f "$MEMORY" ]; then echo ''; echo '📁 PROJECT MEMORY:'; head -30 "$MEMORY"; fi; echo '═══════════════════════════════════════'; echo '💡 /continue — восстановить контекст | /checkpoint — сохранить прогресс'; echo ''
